title: [firtool] `verbose-pass-execution` not printing the final two passes
body:
`-verbose-pass-executions` is not printing the final two passes.  The last line printed is:

```
[firtool] Running "hw.module(cse, canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}, hw-cleanup)"
[firtool] -- Done in 4.138 sec
```
This is missing `ExportSplitVerilog` and `HWExportModuleHierarchy`:
```
    2.6278 (  1.5%)    0.1379 (  0.1%)  'hw.module' Pipeline
    0.3368 (  0.2%)    0.0171 (  0.0%)    HWLegalizeModules
    2.1072 (  1.2%)    0.1306 (  0.1%)    PrettifyVerilog
    7.4712 (  4.4%)    7.4712 (  7.7%)  ExportSplitVerilog
    0.7133 (  0.4%)    0.7133 (  0.7%)  HWExportModuleHierarchy
    0.0418 (  0.0%)    0.0418 (  0.0%)  Rest
  170.6345 (100.0%)   97.5451 (100.0%)  Total
```

Looks like we just need to register the instrumentation for the new pass manager

https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/main/tools/firtool/firtool.cpp#L563

```c++
  if (verbosePassExecutions)
    pm.addInstrumentation(std::make_unique<FirtoolPassInstrumentation>());
 ```
